title: Pwh8U5T91Yif5Kgmgh3F2Xbpyd13Dm
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
October ended with 648.4 million square meters of floor space available in China's commercial buildings (which includes residential buildings), which marks the largest amount seen since February. Even more significant is that compared to the end of the last several years, this 648.4 million square meters of floor space continues to mark the largest amount available since 2016. As we have continued to stress in Commodore's Weekly Dry Bulk Reports and Weekly China Reports, a huge excess of homes remains available in China's housing market.
